creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: miwi
Date: Wed Jun  4 08:49:58 UTC 2014
New revision: 356448
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/356448

Log:
  SFCGAL is a C++ wrapper library around CGAL with the aim of supporting ISO
  19107:2013 and OGC Simple Features Access 1.2 for 3D operations.

  SFCGAL provides standard compliant geometry types and operations, that can be
  accessed from its C or C++ APIs. PostGIS uses the C API, to expose some
  SFCGAL's functions in spatial databases

  WWW: http://www.sfcgal.org/

  PR:		ports/188927
  Submitted by:	Lo?\195?\131?\194?\175c BARTOLETTI <coder@tuxfamily.org>

Changes:
  head/databases/Makefile
  head/databases/sfcgal/
  head/databases/sfcgal/Makefile
  head/databases/sfcgal/distinfo
  head/databases/sfcgal/pkg-descr
  head/databases/sfcgal/pkg-plist
